entry.title: New: Bill 32 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, APPENDIX A, PART I, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT BLOCK GRANT - DISASTER RECOVERY" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget, Appendix A, Part I, Grants and Restricted Use Revenues - Schedule of Grants and Restricted Use Revenues by Departments and Programs for Fiscal Year 2025, by adding a new appropriation under the Department of Management entitled, "Community Development Block Grant - Disaster Recovery" in the amount of $1,639,381,000 with conditional language to 1) allow for disbursement for salaries and premium pay for up to 56.0 Limited Term Appointment equivalent personnel; and 2) require a copy of the quarterly report transmitted to the United States Department of Housing and Urban Development to also be submitted to the Council.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
